title: table-branch-activation-slice evals sidecar
goal: Draft the evals.json page for the new table-branch-activation-slice skill.
scope: Define bounded acceptance and boundary cases for the skill.
Keep the evals at policy and workflow level.
Avoid pretending there is a single executable script for the whole slice.
non_goals: Do not add a wrapper script.
Do not edit any other sidecar.
done_definition: it contains mainline and boundary cases
it reflects bounded activation rather than generic parser use
required_checks: Keep write scope to owned_paths only
Keep cases tied to the real table-branch workflow
